# Working Group Status Fixture

## Agenda

- Administrivia: confirm agenda, note takers, and remote participation.
- Document status: summarize drafts that changed since the previous meeting.
- Open issues: identify the decisions that need room consensus.
- Implementation feedback: collect interop findings and deployment constraints.
- Next steps: assign owners, dates, and review expectations.
- Appendix material: keep background evidence available without crowding the main talk.

## Draft status

Claim: the draft set is ready for focused review because each open item has a clear owner and next action.

| Draft | Owner | Change | Next action |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| draft-alpha | Team A | Terminology update | Working group last call |
| draft-beta | Team B | Security section expanded | Reviewer assignment |
| draft-gamma | Team C | Examples rewritten | Implementation feedback |

## Decision slide

- Decision needed: accept the revised terminology.
- Evidence: no implementation objections were raised in the last two review cycles.
- Condition: keep the migration note in the appendix.
- Owner: editor group.
